zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Roger de Gernet I於1173年出生時，他的父親Benedict de Gernet37歲，母親Mabel FitzUrse36歲。他於1215年之前與Mrs. Roger De Gernet I在英國英格蘭藍卡爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他於1207年在英國藍卡爾被列為chief forester of lancashire。他去世於1252年11月8日之前在英國英格蘭爾哈爾頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Roger de Gernet I于1173年出生时，他的父亲Benedict de Gernet37岁，母亲Mabel FitzUrse36岁。他于1215年之前与Mrs. Roger De Gernet I在英国英格兰藍卡爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他于1207年在英国藍卡爾被列为chief forester of lancashire。他去世于1252年11月8日之前在英国英格兰爾哈爾頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Gernet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: derivative of Middle High German gern ‘to desire’, a component of various ancient Germanic personal names such as Gernhard. Alternatively, a variant of Gernot .

variants.name: Gernot
meanings: German: from an ancient Germanic personal name composed of the elements gēr ‘spear’ + knōt- ‘(to) swing’.

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Roger de Gernet I was born in 1173, his father, Benedict de Gernet, was 37 and his mother, Mabel FitzUrse, was 36. He married Mrs. Roger De Gernet I before 1215, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. In 1207, his occupation is listed as chief forester of lancashire in Lancashire, England. He died before 8 November 1252, in Halton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Roger de Gernet I est né en 1173, son père, Benedict de Gernet, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Mabel FitzUrse, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Mrs. Roger De Gernet I avant 1215, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. En 1207, sa profession de son indiquée est chief forester of lancashire à Lancashire, Angleterre. Il est décédé avant 8 novembre 1252, à Halton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Roger de Gernet I 1173 geboren wurde, war sein Vater Benedict de Gernet 37 und seine Mutter Mabel FitzUrse 36. Er hat vor 1215 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom Mrs. Roger De Gernet I geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. 1207 ist sein Beruf als chief forester of lancashire in Lancashire, England aufgeführt. Er starb vor 8. November 1252 in Halton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger de Gernet I è nato il nel 1173, il suo padre, Benedict de Gernet, aveva 37 anni e il suo madre, Mabel FitzUrse, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Mrs. Roger De Gernet I prima del 1215, nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Nel 1207, la sua occupazione è indicata come chief forester of lancashire nel Lancashire, England. Morì prima del 8 novembre 1252, nel Halton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Roger de Gernet Iが1173年に生まれた時，父Benedict de Gernetは37歳，母Mabel FitzUrseは36歳であった。1215年以前にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアでMrs. Roger De Gernet Iと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。1207年，イギリスランカシュアイアでの職業はchief forester of lancashireと記録されている。彼は1252年11月8日以前にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアハルトンで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Roger de Gernet I(이)가 1173년에 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Benedict de Gernet(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Mabel FitzUrse(은)는 36세였다. 그는 1215년 이전 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 Mrs. Roger De Gernet I(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 1207년, 그의 직업은 영국 랭카실르에서 chief forester of lancashire이었다. 그는 1252년 11월 8일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 할턴에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Roger de Gernet I nasceu em 1173, seu pai, Benedict de Gernet, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Mabel FitzUrse, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs. Roger De Gernet I antes 1215, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Em 1207, sua profissão aparece como chief forester of lancashire em Lancashire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu antes 8 de novembro de 1252, em Halton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Roger de Gernet I родился в 1173 г., его отцу по имени Benedict de Gernet было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabel FitzUrse, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs. Roger De Gernet I перед 1215 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. В 1207 году он работал по профессии chief forester of lancashire в местности ланкашир, Англия. Он умер перед 8 ноябрь 1252 г. в местности хэлтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

sm.from 1207 to 1252: mai le 1207 e o'o I le 1252

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Roger de Gernet I nació en 1173, su papá, Benedict de Gernet, tenía 37 años y su mamá, Mabel FitzUrse, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Mrs. Roger De Gernet I antes de 1215, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. En 1207, su ocupación registrada era chief forester of lancashire en Lancashire, Inglaterra. Murió antes de 8 de noviembre de 1252, en Halton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
